What are some examples of the names we give to those who take but don't give in return? Note that in every society, people who don't give back to the people who have first given to them are called freeloaders, moochers, ingrates, and yes, as some parents insist, teenagers. Now, there are no words in any language that are positive for those who don't reciprocate. As our societies developed, they allowed us to build larger and more extended relationships, even with strangers with whom we could make profitable exchanges, because all human societies adhere to the principle of reciprocity. It will increase consent even among those who were born or raised in cultures different from our own. Therefore, in a time of increasing globalization, approaches leveraging reciprocity should be even more effective.
